basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Laboratory Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical), Class-3 Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 02 vacancies have been announced through the GSSSB Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical), Class-3 Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 33 years Age relaxation for PwD candidates: 10 years (maximum age 45 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or allied branches from recognized board/university, Basic knowledge of computer applications, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both
qualification.details: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Metallurgy or Fabrication Technology or Automobile Engineering or Mining Engineering or Production Engineering or Industrial Engineering or Mechatronics or equivalent from a recognized board/university. Basic knowledge of computer applications. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

salary_details.details: Rs. 26,000/- per month for the first 5 years. After 5 years, the salary will be in the pay scale of Rs. 26000 - 63200 Per Month.

selection_process: Written Test (MCQ CBRT/OMR) Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GSSSB Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical), Class-3 Job 2026 Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the GSSSB Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical) posts is 29th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 33 years for all candidates applying for the Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical) position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or allied branches from a recognized board or university, along with basic computer knowledge and proficiency in Gujarati or Hindi.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical), Class-3, as per the GSSSB recruitment notification for 2026-27.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 400/- for SC/ST and Women candidates. This fee must be paid online.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test (MCQ CBRT/OMR), followed by Document Verification, and finally, the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q7. What is the starting salary for a Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical)?
faq.answer: The initial salary for a Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical) is Rs. 26,000/- per month for the first 5 years. After this period, the salary will be in the scale of Rs. 26000 - 63200 Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a relaxation of 10 years for PwD candidates, allowing them to apply if their age does not exceed 45 years.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the GSSSB Laboratory Assistant (Mechanical) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official GSSSB website between the application start and end dates. Ensure all details are correctly filled and documents are uploaded.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
